failed_clause.text: Exact collective-support extraction completes under the 4,096-attack cap on every measured hard development framework.
failed_clause.reason: The diagnostic eagerly calls _minimal_supports(framework) before it can count collective attacks or enforce the 4,096 cap. The cap therefore does not bound exact support extraction on the first hard row.

observation.interruption: The frozen command was interrupted only after the profiler attached to the real hot process and diagnosed the active extraction stack.

failure_analysis.compared_against: The frozen operational hypothesis that exact support extraction would complete under an executable 4,096 collective-attack cap before SCC conditioning was assessed.
failure_analysis.dominant_cost_before: No prior hard-row extraction profile was preregistered; the intended bounded operation was exact support extraction followed by collective-attack counting and SCC conditioning.
failure_analysis.dominant_cost_observed: Eager minimal-support antichain construction in _add_minimal_support/_minimal_set/_combine_supports/_minimal_supports before any cap check.
failure_analysis.intended_invariant: Clause 2: exact collective-support extraction is bounded by the frozen 4,096 collective-attack cap.
failure_analysis.interpretation: The intended clause did not become executable on the hard row. No support count, SCC shape, residual reduction, branch count, or boundary size was produced.
failure_analysis.next_target_from_evidence: Before this SCC route could be reconsidered, exact support generation would need an executable in-generation bound or equivalent bounded extraction contract; this reconciliation does not design or implement one.

campaign_disposition: Round 1 probe 5 operationally killed; no full experiment consumed.
